title: Digital-to-Branch Channel Switch Spike — 47% Increase
description: 312 members switched from digital to branch mid-journey this week, up 47% from last week. Concentrated in mortgage and auto loan applications.

title: Mortgage Journey Abandonment — CSAT Dropped to 2.8
description: 423 members abandoned the mortgage application journey at document upload. Post-interaction CSAT for this touchpoint fell from 3.6 to 2.8 in 5 days.

title: IVR Escalation Queue 3x Normal Volume
description: 267 members escalated from IVR to live agent this week — 3x normal volume. Top reason: unable to resolve CD rate inquiry via self-service.
